parameters.html:
=

CyberReadyLabs

Security Assessment Results

Hi {{ $json.company }} team,

Thank you for completing the CyberReadyLabs Security Assessment.

Your Score: {{ $json.percentage }}%

Risk Level: {{ $json.riskLevel }}

Key Findings

Based on your responses, we identified {{ $json.gapCount }} critical {{ $json.gapCount === 1 ? 'gap' : 'gaps' }} in your security posture and {{ $json.mitreCount }} potential attack {{ $json.mitreCount === 1 ? 'technique' : 'techniques' }} your organization may be vulnerable to.

Your highest-priority gaps:

    {{ $json.gap1 ? '
  • ' + $json.gap1 + '
    • ' : '' }}{{ $json.gap2 ? '
  • ' + $json.gap2 + '
    • ' : '' }}{{ $json.gap3 ? '
  • ' + $json.gap3 + '
    • ' : '' }}

Frameworks assessed: {{ $json.frameworks }}
